# Codantrix Labs

A multi-agent engineering studio building production agentic systems. Founded 2023 in Lahore, Pakistan. Working with teams across US and EU time zones.

URL: https://labs.codantrix.com
Contact: contact@codantrix.com
Founder: Hassan Ali Mehdi (engineering lead)

## What we build

- Multi-agent orchestration with hierarchical retrieval
- Agentic copilots with domain-specific RAG
- Production observability + agent eval suites
- Client-facing dashboards over agent systems
- Document AI pipelines (English and Arabic)

## What we do not build

- Generic chatbots
- No-code workflow automations
- SOC 2 / HIPAA compliance deployments (not our lane yet)
- Pure CRUD apps without an agentic component

## Service tiers

- Tier A: Production agentic systems. $15K — 30K. 6 — 10 weeks. Three SKUs (Workflow / Platform / Custom Enterprise).
- Tier B: Agentic MVPs. $8K — 15K. 4 — 6 weeks. Three SKUs (AI Feature Add-on / Agentic MVP / Custom).

Detailed SKU pages live at /services/tier-a and /services/tier-b (shipping at v3, after first Tier A engagement).

## Engagement model

Fixed scope, fixed price. No hourly billing. SOW signed before any work begins. 50/50 payment terms. IP transfers on final payment. Owned codebase. Every change ends in a deploy — see /writing/we-end-in-a-deploy.

## Stack

Next.js · Python · OpenAI · Claude · LangGraph · pgvector · Milvus · AWS · Cloudflare Workers · D1

## Verticals shipped

Real estate ops · Field ops dispatch · Construction estimation · EdTech learning · Document AI (Arabic + English)

## Pages

- / — Home: studio overview, services teaser, work grid, process strip
- /studio — Studio operating principles, anti-services, current focus
- /work — Work index with five anonymized case studies
  - /work/tenant-ops-copilot — Multi-agent system for US property management
  - /work/dispatch-agent — Autonomous dispatch for North American service network
  - /work/estimation-copilot — Quote-generation system for regional contractor
  - /work/study-agent — AI exam-prep with PDF chat + MCQ generation
  - /work/bilingual-doc-pipeline — Arabic RAG over 100 regulatory PDFs
- /founder — Hassan Ali Mehdi bio and timeline (only page where "I" voice is used)
- /writing — Field notes from shipping production agentic systems
- /book — Scope assistant (chat) + booking link to a 30-min scope call
- /privacy — Privacy notice
- /terms — Terms of service

## Writing

Field notes on shipping production agentic systems. Architecture, evaluation, cost, and the parts that do not fit a tweet.

- /writing/we-end-in-a-deploy — A working condition we wrote down: every change ends in production behind a real URL, or it does not end at all.
- /writing/the-6k-tpm-rule-of-free-llm-stacks — There is exactly one number that controls what is possible inside a free LLM stack: 6,000 tokens per minute.
- /writing/build-vs-buy-agent-platforms-in-2026 — When to build your own agent platform from primitives versus integrating LangGraph, Agno, or AWS Bedrock Agents.

RSS: /writing/rss.xml

## Process

Four steps, shown on home and (deeper) at /process (v3):

1. Scoping call — 30 min, free
2. Written SOW + 50% upfront
3. Weekly shipped demos — Friday Loom + production code behind feature flags
4. Production handoff on final 50%

## Booking

Book a 30-min scope call: https://labs.codantrix.com/book

## Voice

Corporate "we" everywhere except the /founder bio paragraphs, where Hassan speaks in "I". The studio is small on purpose — every engagement involves contractors, but engineering lead is always Hassan.
